titleStmt.title: SII 41.54: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 54. (A.R. No. 53 of 1905.) Daḷavānūr, Gingee Taluk, South Arcot District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Īsvara temple in the same village.

summary.p: The king issued an order through his officer Cheyyagaṅgadēvar making some land in Talaivānallūr as tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Cheyyakichuramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār. A number of taxes exempted is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . samastabhuvanaikavira candrakulamaṅgala pradipamadhurāpuri mahendra coḷakula kāḷāndhakāra divākara coḷa vamśavāri rāśipandhabānala laṅkāpati kāḷakūṭa kadanakāḷa kaṇṭhakkarikāḷabhakaṇdhirava kṣemāsura vidāraṇa narasimhakāmvamśavaiśvānara jayan=tamaṅgalapurādhiśvara vīragaṇḍagopāla bhujaṅgavihaṅgarāja kāñcipura viracitasāmrājyābhiṣeka gaṇapa
ti gaṇḍagajakūṭapākala bahuvidhavairiduggabhājana praṇatarāja sthāpanācārya tribhuvana rājādhirāja parameśvara śrīvikramapāṇḍyadeva svastiśrī toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭu prahmatecaṟataṉiyūr śrīirājarājaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai talaivāynallūril namakku naṉṟākac ceyyakaṅkatevar Olaippaṭināyaṉār
ceyyacikicuram muṭaiyanāyaṉārkku tevatāṉam kaṭṭaicceṟu rūpāy � pāṇaṉkuṇṭil rūpāy 3 pakaḷāraṭi rūpāy 100 nilaṉtiruttu taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāṉāṉāl rūpāy kiḻaikkaṭṭaicceṟu taṭi nāliṉāl rūpāy 6mā maṭappuṟam Irumpiliyāṉa tākkutaṭi Aiñciṉāl rūpāy 6 Ākap perumpaṭi rūpāy 5 100 Iṉṉāyaṉār Eṟiaruḷiṉa Āṇṭu mutal tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyākak kārumpacāṉamum navirai
cittiraikkaṇṭaṉ payir karumpu kamuku kaḻunir vāḻaikoḻuntu mañcaḷiñci Uḷḷiṭṭa veṇṭum payir ceytu Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tiruppaṇi taṭṭuppaṭāmal celuttavum Iṉṉilattukku kaṭamai Iṉavari kācukaṭamai veṭṭi nilaiyāḷ paṇikkottu Ōlai Eḻuttu viṉiyokamvācal viṉivokam Aviṣekak kāṇikkai pañcupīlikūṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai taṇṭuvāṇ peṟuuṭaippo (unfinished)
Digital edition of SII 41.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
